articles.title: Trump to host exclusive dinner for top $TRUMP holders, token jumps over 70%
articles.description: Top holders of the $TRUMP coin will have the opportunity to dine with President Donald Trump, according to information on the project's website. Details of the exclusive event, known as the $TRUMP Gala Dinner, surfaced after community members uncovered a webpage on the projects site indicating that the president planned to host a dinner for major $TRUMP coin holders. At the time of its discovery, the page was still under development and did not show any information. The invitation-only event, no

articles.title: Ubisoft Brings 'Might & Magic' to Ethereum via Immutable Card Game
articles.description: Might & Magic: Fates is a new Ethereum-driven card game launching later this year from Ubisoft and Immutable.

articles.title: Scroll launches ‘Euclid’ upgrade to slash Ethereum layer 2 fees by 90%
articles.description: 23-4-2025 – In a development for Ethereum’s scaling ecosystem, Scroll, a prominent Layer 2 solution, has unveiled a transformative upgrade named Euclid, heralded as the most significant protocol evolution since its mainnet debut. Announced on Wednesday, this overhaul promises to slash transaction fees by an impressive 90%, while bolstering network performance and fortifying security measures. [.

articles.title: Institutions break up with Ethereum but keep ETH on the hook
articles.description: Ethereum is entering one of its most precarious periods since its inception. Usage on the base layer is plummeting, core metrics are nearing multi-year lows, and even co-founder Vitalik Buterin is proposing a radical architectural overhaul. Institutions aren’t waiting to see how it plays out. Blockchain data shows that long-time supporters such as Galaxy Digital and Paradigm have been slashing their Ether (ETH) holdings in recent weeks

articles.description: Stop funding Big Tech and start supporting emerging tech.

articles.description: Cardano (ADA) may experience explosive price appreciation in the near future, with some experts projecting more than 1,000% gains, based on recent market movements. articles.title: Scroll’s Euclid Upgrade Pushes It Into ‘Stage 1’ Decentralization Era
articles.description: Scroll, the Ethereum layer-2 network, shared Wednesday that it has launched its Euclid upgrade, which the team called its most significant protocol transformation to date.According to Scroll Labs, a key consequence of the upgrade is that it transitions Scroll from a "stage 0" to a “stage 1” rollup, meaning the network will retire some centrally-controlled safety features in an effort to become more decentralized.“Euclid represents the biggest leap forward for Scroll since its inception,” the tea

articles.title: What are spot Solana ETFs with staking? Canada’s crypto innovation explained
articles.description: What are spot Solana ETFs and why are they important? A spot Solana ETF is an exchange-traded fund that holds Solana (SOL) tokens directly, providing investors real-time exposure to the asset’s market price. Rather than using complex trading platforms or crypto wallets, you can access Solana via a regulated financial product traded on a traditional stock exchange. The value of Solana ETFs is directly tied to the open market price of SOL, offering a simple way to gain exposure to the blockchain’s

articles.title: MoonPay CEO Predicts Crypto Wallets to Replace Traditional Bank Accounts
articles.description: According to PANews, MoonPay's CEO and co-founder, Ivan Soto-Wright, expressed in an interview that cryptocurrency wallets are poised to eventually replace traditional bank accounts. He also hinted at the potential launch of a stablecoin by MoonPay in the future. Currently, MoonPay is shifting towards a non-custodial, API-first approach, aiming to provide developers with plug-and-play infrastructure similar to Stripe. articles.title: Solana DEX Meteora Sued Over Alleged Pump-and-Dump Meme Coin Launch
articles.description: The class action lawsuit alleges that the Solana DEX jointly planned "blatant fraud” with the M3M3 token launch.

articles.title: Ethereum (ETH) Underperforms All Top 5 Major Cryptos in Brutal 2025 Downtrend
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) is under pressure as it attempts to recover from one of its worst-performing years among major cryptocurrencies, down nearly 50% in 2025. Despite signs of improving momentum, with RSI climbing and EMA lines hinting at a potential breakout, ETH continues to lag behind competitors like Solana in multiple metrics. The ETH/BTC ratio has plunged to multi-year lows amid heavy institutional sell-offs. As ETH approaches key resistance, the market remains divided, with bulls eyeing a break
